generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we're not just protecting our economy—we're safeguarding our very sovereignty. Don't let them divide us with false promises of open borders and free trade. It's time to stand united and secure our future. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
